name: operational_transparency
evidence_quotes: Our drivers complete a 200-hour certification program. Every vehicle is inspected before each shift. Our infrastructure rests on 30 years of black-car experience.

TSA-certified drivers. ISO 9001 quality management. Department-of-Transportation-licensed fleet. Insurance coverage exceeding $5 million per ride. Our credentials are not marketing — they are the operational floor.

name: progressive_commitment
evidence_quotes: Start with one trip. One executive, one airport transfer. See the difference. Most clients begin with a single VIP trip and scale to enterprise-wide integration within 90 days.
Sign up your company today and your first three executive trips are complimentary. No card required. We invest in proving the service before asking for the long-term commitment.

name: institutional_mirroring
evidence_quotes: We treat your team the way the firm would treat its top clients.
Our partnership with your travel-management company means we share data, share standards, and share accountability. We are an extension of your team, not a vendor competing for your trust.
Top-tier corporate travel for the senior executive. The highest standards in the industry. Leading global firms trust LUXY to elevate their travel experience above the standard ride-hail market.
Move beyond ad-hoc booking. Advance toward fully integrated expense reporting via your Concur or SAP TripActions workflow.
Direct routes. No multi-stop pickups. No detours. We take the fastest path from origin to destination, with the driver navigating real-time traffic so your team's path stays clear.
Save 40 minutes per business trip. Our drivers know the routes your team uses, the gates at the airports, and the hotels at your destination. Reclaim that hour for the work that pays.
